response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : FK
ATTR baggage_belt_code : varchar
ATTR airplane_registration : varchar : FK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY Airport
PK airport_id
ATTR airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_code
ATTR status_code : varchar : PK
ATTR status_label : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : FK
ATTR status_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

ENTITY SeatAssignment
PK passenger_id
PK flight_id
ATTR seat : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK crew_id
PK flight_id
ATTR role : varchar

REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=airplane_registration
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_code
REL SeatAssignment -> Passenger : 1 -> 1 : FK=passenger_id
REL SeatAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1 -> 1 : FK=crew_id
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1 -> 1 : FK=flight_id
